name: MOUSA TAISIER AL-RASHDAN
title: Applied AI | Data Engineering | Machine Learning
about: I am an Intelligent Systems Engineer with hands-on experience in data analysis, machine learning, and deep learning systems. I completed a full data analytics training with Correlation One and I am currently advancing my applied AI engineering skills through the AI.SPIRE program.

I focus on building scalable data pipelines, analytical systems, and real-world machine learning solutions. I work with modern AI tools — including LLMs, prompt engineering, and AI-powered APIs — to accelerate development and build smarter applications.
